response.justification: Sarah has strong distributed systems experience, deep full-stack expertise, and notable open-source contributions that align with AI-native engineering environments, but her resume lacks explicit evidence of AI-driven code generation workflows, operational ownership of high-throughput systems at scale, and clear stakeholder coordination at staff level — key for this role.
strengths: Proven experience with distributed, high-throughput systems (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Active contributor to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at re:cinq, aligning with agentic code production
Strong operational and open-source track record with Kubernetes, CI/CD, and tooling development
concerns: No explicit mention of reviewing or extending AI-generated code as a core responsibility
Limited evidence of technical strategy leadership or cross-functional stakeholder management at staff level
Primary language focus is TypeScript/Node.js; Python mastery and systems thinking depth are implied but not demonstrated
